raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 309 represents the opportunity to provide housing as a human right for Californians.",
    "Social housing is a critical tool to address California's housing crisis.",
    "AB 309 aims to create mixed-income housing that is affordable, self-sustaining, and publicly backed.",
    "The Social Housing Program will develop up to three social housing projects on state-owned excess land that is suitable for housing.",
    "The Social Housing Program aims to ensure that rent is no more than 30% of residents' income.",
    "Successful models of social housing in countries like Singapore and Vienna can inspire California's policy making.",
    "Social housing provides affordable homes for large portions of the population.",
    "Social housing investments are returned to the community rather than generating private profit.",
    "Social housing can avoid concentrated poverty in neighborhoods by serving residents of different incomes."
  ]
}
```
